recommendations.recommendation: Minor scaffold access obstruction observed at the demonstration work area. Clear the access route and confirm it remains unobstructed.
Reviewed transcription: Materials appear unevenly stacked beside the internal passageway; reorganise the stack and verify the route is clear.

recommendations.recommendation: Toe-board gaps and incomplete scaffold access control observed in the demonstration area. Install the missing protection and restrict access until the corrective work is recorded.
